feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: A straight approach to being queer
entry.summary:
Author: SueRose

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 97,892Chapters: 24/?Kudos: 84

Summary: Rich nepo boy Arthur Pendragon joins his university's queer club. And pretends to be queer, because he needs to write a paper about queer representation. But.... He has not expected this. This being the leader of the club, namely Merlins Emrys, who does not believe a word he says. Will he be able to appear queer enough to his new peers? Or will all of this end up in a giant disaster?

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: King & Court
entry.summary:
Author: BeautifulFiction

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 342,945Chapters: 73/110Kudos: 3,307

Summary: Loneliness is an insidious thing. When Merlin looks at Arthur, he sees not just a prince waiting for his time to rule, but a young man struggling to find his place in the world, with little help from anyone else. The truth is, Arthur needs more than the friendship Merlin can offer. He needs people he can trust: men and women who will become his court and his confidants, and if he is going to survive to take the throne and lead Camelot into its golden age, he needs them sooner rather than later. Finding loopholes in Uther’s laws is no easy feat. Court life is a dangerous game, but it’s one Merlin has every intention of winning so that Arthur can have knights of his choosing by his side. And then there is the matter of his magic…

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: Within Four Walls
entry.summary:
Author: Oakfiddle

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,713Chapters: 6/9Kudos: 39

Summary: Merlin and his mum wans to move away from Ealdor to get a fresh start, to leave his mum's abusive ex-boyfriend behind.They go to Camelot to look at a flat. His mum falls in love with the flat, and Merlin falls in love with the property manager, who also happens be the landlord's son.Why can't life be simple for once?

entry.title: Essetir’s Kings Manservant
entry.summary:
Author: RamonaflowersFrFr

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,386Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 10

Summary: Before Hunith had decided to send Merlin to Camelot he went to try and convince King Cenred to help protect his village, one thing after another Cenred decided he liked the boy and he would be appointed his manservant — Camelot and Essetir are having feast in Camelots attempt at a peace treaty, Arthur finds himself allured by the Manservant and keeps going back to him throughout the feast, Merlin is equally as intrigued in Arthur, he can feel his magic pulling him towards Arthur every moment they’re together.

entry.title: Arthur is a Sword
entry.summary:
Author: BreadBoxRye

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,114Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 21

Summary: When a mysterious sorcerer comes to Camelot, Arthur becomes trapped in his own sword, mere moments after witnessing Merlin use magic. Simultaneously, Merlin is cursed to be mute. The poor warlock is unable to explain himself as he listens to Arthur-the-Sword shout at him, and Merlin frantically journeys to save them both from their curses.

entry.title: Professor Emrys
entry.summary:
Author: Sophthenerd

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,630Chapters: 14/?Kudos: 335

Summary: What if Merlin was best friends with the Marauders but left for an internship just after school ended. What happens when he returns years later and learns what happened to his friends while he was gone.This is my first fic so it might be a little choppy. For some context all 5 seasons of Merlin are canon in this and this takes place while Merlin is waiting for Arthur to rise from the lake of Avalon. Books one and two of Harry Potter are the same and the story starts off just before book three.

entry.title: For you
entry.summary:
Author: KuroNikushimi

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,527Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 14

Summary: Arthur gets kidnapped and is supposed to be sacrificed by midday. Merlin frantically searches for him, but can't find him. He comes upon a group of people who know where Arthur is.. They'll tell him, they say, if Merlin sleeps with each of them. And Merlin would do anything for Arthur. Anything. Had graphic rape but afterwards deal with Merlin's ptsd, Arthur's guilt and very slow recovery

entry.title: Reign of Bloody Time
entry.summary:
Author: BadAshWolf

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,496Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 2

Summary: For one hundred years, He carved lines into the earth, and runes into himself. Now, it was time to crack both open and bring his future back to the once king. But, as warned in the days of old, nothing will be brought back from the dead without a cost. One paid in bloody secrets. He is a king-maker who has outlived his king, a warlock in truth, bartering his soul for a chance, and as he traces the gaunt hollows of his own face, the reflection ripples with the heat of his magic, a silent, shimmering promise. He will endure the hunger of the void if it means his heart never goes where he cannot follow him again.   Behold my coping mechanism in these here trying times, I submit my taxes for the fandom that brought me here. It's either this or work on my DND game.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
  • Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Time Travel
  • Supernatural Elements
  • Unresolved Sexual Tension

entry.title: When I'm 6 Feet Under and the Bugs are Eating my Heart, All they will Taste is You
entry.summary:
Author: Ap_1238

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,993Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 48

Summary: This is me simply trying to cope the heartbreak that was the finale of Merlin. I watched this show years ago and was distraught to see an edit pop back up. I'll be real, I cried for 2 days straight----The feeling of grief is hard to define.For Arthur Pendragon it was losing everything he thought he had.If only he could see the gold in the night sky.ORthe eyes of someone he loves.----Post season 5 finale. He's not DEAD.Arthur trying to cope with all the pressure.He has a kingdom to rule, a wife to love.But how can he do that if he can't figure out what is in his own heart.----OK IM MAKING THIS SEEM SO ANGSTYIT'S CUTE AND FUNNY TOO I PROMISE*Note: If you are uncomfortable with the idea of Mpreg please do not fret. I'm trying to make this story so you can feel a resolution without feeling pressured to read the whole. For the rest of the freaks (me too babe) I hope you enjoy this beatiful coping mechanism!

entry.title: The Interrupted Fate Of Arthur Pendragon (If He Had Lived)
entry.summary:
Author: R3ady_To_Writ3

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,117Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 4

Summary: An alternate ending where Arthur lives instead of dying because we were fucking robbed of Merlin and Arthur co-existing together as equals. I love the show and wanted to re-write his awful death. Hope you like this new version, it's short but sweet, and open to interpretation!

entry.title: Sundered Veils
entry.summary:
Author: Elora_EC

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 40,843Chapters: 11/12Kudos: 924

Summary: No one survives the Dorocha’s touch.Not even Merlin.At least that’s what Arthur and the Knights think after Merlin saves Arthur’s life by throwing himself at the Dorocha.OrArthur and the knights believe Merlin has died after being struck by the Dorocha and bury him accordingly before continuing their quest to close the veil and save Camelot. But we all know that even the Dorocha cannot stop Merlin.

entry.title: New Beginnings
entry.summary:
Author: Moontra992

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,845Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 65

Summary: The final battle is won. Merlin has fulfilled his destiny. He is dropped from the sky into a new time and place and seeks to fit in and to figure out his new destiny - if there is any. He comes across a kind and welcoming family but soon realizes that nothing is quite as it seems...

entry.title: Different Destiny: The Outlaw Prince
entry.summary:
Author: tansyuduri

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 107,606Chapters: 22/25Kudos: 235

Summary: When Merlin's magic is exposed shortly before season 2 starts, the path of destiny starts changing forever. Now on the run with Arthur, Morgana, and Gwen. Merlin hopes to convince Arthur that magic is totally good instead of him and Morgana just being an exception. Morgana, meanwhile, hopes to convince him to usurp his father. As allies are gathered and Arthur realizes the injustice in his kingdom, it looks more and more like he will have to act in a drastic way. A way he dreads.   Meanwhile, Arthur and Merlin are growing closer and closer and might just have feelings for each other. Something they probably should be better about realizing, considering the example of Gwen and Morgana right next to them.   In a land of myth and a time of magic, the destiny of a great kingdom now rests on the shoulders of four, their names: Merlin, Arthur, Guinevere, and Morgana

  • Hurt/Comfort
  • Comedy
  • Romance
  • Whump

entry.title: Princes should not eat
entry.summary:
Author: Ladi_albion

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,419Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 51

Summary: Merlin has been especially irritable since Freya's death and finds the perfect outlet in seeing how he can annoy Arthur by teasing him about his weight and how much the prince eats. But it turns out that Arthur Pendragon is much more susceptible to his servant's opinion than he imagines. And so an eating disorder is born. A modern disease that no one understands and that, to Merlin's despair, may prevent Albion's destiny from never being fulfilled.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: you're more than stained glass, you're the light that comes through
entry.summary:
Author: itz_blakey

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,922Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 74

Summary: Merlin drinks an enchanted drink meant for Arthur. He expects a lot of things to happen but being able to read minds is not among them.

entry.title: The Shape of Truth
entry.summary:
Author: Joy_peace

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,981Chapters: 7/8Kudos: 55

Summary: Arthur has always trusted Merlin—just not for the reasons Merlin thinks. When Camelot’s peace fractures and something ancient begins to stir, secrets long held in silence begin to surface…and not all of them belong to Merlin.
